recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode II - Attack of the Clones
recommendations.overview: Following an assassination attempt on Senator Padmé Amidala, Jedi Knights Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi investigate a mysterious plot into the heart of the Separatist movement and the beginning of the Clone Wars.

recommendations.title: Maggie Simpson in "The Force Awakens from Its Nap"
recommendations.overview: In a daycare far, far away… but still in Springfield, Maggie is on an epic quest for her stolen pacifier. Her adventure brings her face-to-face with young Padawans, Sith Lords, familiar droids, Rebel scum, and an ultimate battle against the dark side

recommendations.title: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith
recommendations.overview: When the sinister Sith unveil a thousand-year-old plot to rule the galaxy, the Republic crumbles and from its ashes rises the evil Galactic Empire. Jedi hero Anakin Skywalker must choose a side.

recommendations.title: Star Wars

recommendations.title: LEGO Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Out
recommendations.overview: Luke Skywalker embarks on a mission to destroy an Imperial base, but is relentlessly chased by a group of fanatic girls who think of him as a celebrity. Meanwhile, Darth Vader engages a rivalry with Darth Maul, in order to prove that he's the best Si

recommendations.title: Robot Chicken: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Action, TV Movie, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A series of 30 sketches, following the hilarious antics of various characters from a galaxy, far, far away.

recommendations.title: Womb
recommendations.overview: A woman's consuming love forces her to bear the clone of her dead beloved. From his infancy to manhood, she faces the unavoidable complexities of her controversial decision.

recommendations.title: The Ice Pirates

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi
recommendations.overview: Luke Skywalker leads a mission to rescue his friend Han Solo from the clutches of Jabba the Hutt, the Emperor prepares to crush the Rebellion with a more powerful Death Star, and the Rebel fleet mounts a massive attack on the space station. Luke Skyw

recommendations.title: Dual
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill woman opts for a cloning procedure to ease her loss on her friends and family. When she makes a miraculous recovery, her attempts to have her clone decommissioned fail and lead to a court-mandated duel to the death.
